channel.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jul 9th - Jul 15th, 2018
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • DSL-JSONstars716 - High performance JSON library with advanced compile-time databinding.
  • jsoniter - Claims to be the fastest JSON parser ever (copy of DSL-JSON).

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jul 2nd - Jul 8th, 2018
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • RTree2Dstars98 - RTree2D is a 2D immutable R-tree with STR (Sort-Tile-Recursive) packing for ultra-fast nearest and intersection queries on plane and spherical surfaces.

    • Virtual Machines

  • MobiDevelop's RoboVM Forkstars647 - Ahead of time compiler for JVM bytecode targeting iOS, Mac OSX and Linux.

    • Languages

  • JPHPstars1.6k - PHP on the Java VM.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Apr 2nd - Apr 8th, 2018
item.description:
Profilers

  • jvm-profilerstars1.5k - Java Agent to collect various metrics and stacktraces for Hadoop/Spark JVM processes in a distributed way.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Mar 19th - Mar 25th, 2018
item.description:
Documentation

  • TCP Tracepoints Linux bcc/BPF using tcplife by Brendan Gregg

    • Profilers

  • jfr-report-toolstars43 - Tool for creating reports from Java Flight Recorder dumps.
  • Byteman - tracing, monitoring and testing tool for Java

    • Garbage collectors

  • Azul Pauseless Garbage Collection - Providing continuous, pauseless operation for Java applications.

    • Nix tools

  • taskset/process-affinity - Retrieve or set a processes’s CPU affinity.

    • People

  • Paul Phillips - Forever undisputed SLOC Scala compiler dev.
  • Richard Startin - Performance Analyst, developer, blogger.
  • Lukas Eder - Blogger. Author of JOOQ.
  • Rafael Winterhalter - Author of ByteBuddy.
  • Ivan Krylov - JVM expert.
  • Vladimir Ivanov - hacking HotSpot JVM @ Oracle.
  • Ron Pressler - Parallel Universe. Leading Fibers and Continuations for the JVM.
  • Claes Redestad - Working with OpenJDK stuff @ Oracle.
  • Per Liden - Hacking on the HotSpot JVM at Oracle.
  • Stephen Colebourne - Java Champion. Occasional blogger and speaker. Best known for Joda projects and JSR-310.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Mar 12th - Mar 18th, 2018
item.description:
Profilers

  • micrometerstars2.9k - An application metrics facade for the most popular monitoring tools.

    • Network

  • proteus-javastars42 - Proteus Java Client based on RSocket.
  • Chronicle-Networkstars163 - A High Performance Network library.
  • one-niostars469 - library for building high performance Java servers.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Feb 26th - Mar 4th, 2018
item.description:
Native

  • Java Grinderstars356 - Compile Java bytecode to microcontroller assembly.

    • Media

  • FOSDEM 2018 - FOSDEM 2018 Free Java devroom.
  • JFokus 2018 - The GC edition. Shenandoah, ZGC, Zing, Fibers, Falcon etc.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • Reactive Streams Utilitiesstars60 - Future standard utilities library for Reactive Streams.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Feb 12th - Feb 18th, 2018
item.description:
Nix tools

  • bccstars11.6k - Tools for BPF-based Linux IO analysis, networking, monitoring, and more.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Feb 5th - Feb 11th, 2018
item.description:
Network

  • reactive-grpcstars611 - Reactive gRPC is a suite of libraries for using gRPC with Reactive Streams programming libraries.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • mph-tablestars84 - Minimal Perfect Hash Tables are an immutable key/value store with efficient space utilization and fast reads.
  • splitmapstars16 - A parallel bitmap implementation.

    • Profilers

  • bytestacksstars26 - Turn JVM bytecode execution into flame graphs.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jan 22nd - Jan 28th, 2018
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • fast-uuidstars115 - Java library for quickly and efficiently parsing and writing UUIDs.
  • externalsortinginjavastars198 - Sort very large files using multiple cores and an external-memory algorithm.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jan 8th - Jan 14th, 2018
item.description:
Metaprogramming

  • lombok - Reduce the amount of boilerplate code that is commonly written for Java classes.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • mug - A small, zero-dep functional util library originating from Google.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Dec 18th - Dec 24th, 2017
item.description:
Profilers

  • osquery - osquery is an instrumentation framework that expose the operating system as a high-performance relational database.
  • GCeasy - Machine learning guided Garbage collection log analysis tool. Auto-detect problems in the JVM GC logs and recommend solutions to it.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • VarInt - No-deps variable int implementation without deps (by Bazel).

    • Nix tools

  • iopingstars767 - Simple disk I/0 latency measuring tool.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Dec 11th - Dec 17th, 2017
item.description:
Machine Learning

  • Deeplearning4j - Open-Source, Distributed, Deep Learning Library for the JVM.
  • H2O - Fast statistical, machine learning & math runtime.
  • Smilestars5.2k - Statistical Machine Intelligence & Learning Engine.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Dec 4th - Dec 10th, 2017
item.description:
People

  • Heinz Kabutz - Author of 250+ Java Specialists' Newsletters.
  • Jake Wharton - Square, Google, open source hacker.
  • Andrey Breslav - Lead Language Designer of Kotlin @ JetBrains.

    • Media

  • Which technique do programming language parsers and interpreters use? - Cliff Click.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Nov 13th - Nov 19th, 2017
item.description:
Garbage collectors

  • Epsilon GC - Completely passive GC implementation with bounded allocation limit, and lowest runtime performance overhead possible.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • Eclipse Collectionsstars1.7k - Collections framework for Java.
  • failsafestars3.4k - A lightweight, zero-dependency library for handling failures.
  • injectorstars59 - A new Executor for Java.
  • java-concurrent-hash-trie-mapstars142 - Java port of a concurrent trie hash map implementation from Scala collections.
  • java-hllstars277 - Java library for the HyperLogLog algorithm.
  • JavaFastPFORstars429 - Library to compress and uncompress arrays of integers very fast.

    • Metaprogramming

  • grappastars63 - Java fork of Parboiled. Write grammars with no preprocessing phase.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Nov 6th - Nov 12th, 2017
item.description:
Media

  • Shenandoah: The Garbage Collector That Could - Aleksey Shipilev - Devoxx 2017/11
  • Cliff Click podcast 2017/09/16 - Programming and Performance Intro.
  • Cliff Click podcast 2017/09/16 - Bugs and Coding Styles.
  • Cliff Click podcast 2017/09/18 - Java vs C/C++.
  • Cliff Click podcast 2017/09/21 - Debugging Data Races.
  • Cliff Click podcast 2017/09/24 - Fast Bytecodes for Funny Languages.
  • Cliff Click podcast 2017/09/28 - Struct of Arrays vs Array of Structs.
  • Cliff Click podcast 2017/10/04 - The 3 Hardest Problems in Programming.
  • Cliff Click podcast 2017/11/05 - Modern Hardware Performance and Cache Lines.
  • Cliff Click podcast 2017/11/09 - Queuing In Practice.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Oct 30th - Nov 5th, 2017
item.description:
Garbage collectors

  • ZGC - Garbage collector optimized for low latency and very large heaps.

    • Profilers

  • OpenTracing - A vendor-neutral open standard for distributed tracing.

    • Documentation

  • Linux tracing workshopstars937 - JVM monitoring with BPF, examples and hands-on labs for Linux tracing tools workshops.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Oct 9th - Oct 15th, 2017
item.description:
Virtual Machines

  • Eclipse OpenJ9stars2.6k - Eclipse OpenJ9.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Oct 2nd - Oct 8th, 2017
item.description:
Media

  • Kernel Recipes 2017: Performance Analysis with BPF - Brendan Gregg.
  • The Future of the Linux Page Cache - Matthew Wilcox.
  • Fast and safe production monitoring of JVM with BPF tools - Sasha Goldshtein.
  • Everything about Stack Traces and Heap Dumps - Andrei Pangin.
  • Shenandoah deep talk - Aleksey Shipilëv slightly-deeper-than-usual Shenandoah talk from Virtual Machine Meetup 2017.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • streamvbytestars195 - Fast integer compression in C using the StreamVByte codec.

    • Communities

  • Virtual Machine Meetup 2017 - Venue for discussing the latest research and developments in the area of managed language execution.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Sep 18th - Sep 24th, 2017
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • wirestars3.5k - Clean, lightweight protocol buffers for Android and Java.
  • jOOLstars1.8k - Useful extensions to Java 8 lambdas.

    • Profilers

  • gravstars266 - A collection of tools to help visualise process execution.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Aug 7th - Aug 13th, 2017
item.description:
Network

  • JXIOstars71 - Java API over AccelIO (C library), a high-performance asynchronous reliable messaging and RPC library optimized for hardware acceleration.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jul 31st - Aug 6th, 2017
item.description:
Media

  • JVM Language Summit 2017 - JVM Language Summit 2017.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jul 3rd - Jul 9th, 2017
item.description:
Profilers

  • async-profilerstars4k - Sampling CPU profiler for Java featuring AsyncGetCallTrace + perf_events.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jun 5th - Jun 11th, 2017
item.description:
Nix tools

  • jhsdb - Launch a postmortem debugger to analyze the content of a core-dump from a crashed JVM.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm May 29th - Jun 4th, 2017
item.description:
Network

  • RSocket - RSocket is a binary protocol for use on byte stream transports such as TCP, WebSockets, and Aeron.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • java-string-similaritystars2.3k - String similarity and distance measures, including Levenshtein edit distance and sibblings, Jaro-Winkler, Longest Common Subsequence, cosine similarity etc.
  • vavr - Functional Library for Java 8+.

    • Documentation

  • JVM Anatomy Park - mini-post series where every post goes deep for only a single topic by Aleksey Shipilёv.

    • People

  • Kirk Pepperdine - Working in high performance and distributed computing for nearly 20 years.

    • Media

  • G1 Garbage Collector in Java 8/9 - Kirk Pepperdine.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm May 15th - May 21st, 2017
item.description:
Media

  • Analyzing and Debugging the Java HotSpot VM at the OS Level - Volker Simonis.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm May 8th - May 14th, 2017
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • onyx-javastars5 - Mirrors the Onyx Platform core API by providing a Java equivalent for each component of an Onyx workflow.

    • Nix tools

  • tiptop - Like top but also shows instructions per cycle (IPC).

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Mar 27th - Apr 2nd, 2017
item.description:
Profilers

  • jcstress - Experimental harness and tests to aid the research in the correctness of concurrency support in the JVM, class libraries, and hardware.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Mar 20th - Mar 26th, 2017
item.description:
Garbage collectors

  • The Garbage Collection Handbook - Book that addresses new challenges to garbage collection made by recent advances in hardware and software.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • colferstars603 - Binary serialization format and class generator.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Mar 6th - Mar 12th, 2017
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • TraneIO - High-performance implementation of the Future abstraction.

    • Languages

  • Eta - Pure, lazy, strongly typed functional programming language on the JVM.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Feb 20th - Feb 26th, 2017
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • lmdbjnistars197 - Java API to LMDB (HawtJNI) which is an ultra-fast, ultra-compact key-value embedded data store written in C.
  • lmdbjavastars562 - Java API to LMDB (JNR) which is an ultra-fast, ultra-compact key-value embedded data store written in C.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Feb 6th - Feb 12th, 2017
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • parquet - Columnar storage format that uses the record shredding and assembly algorithm described in the Dremel paper.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jan 30th - Feb 5th, 2017
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • geohashstars345 - Java utility methods for geohashing.
  • hollowstars981 - Java library and comprehensive toolset for harnessing small to moderately sized in-memory datasets.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jan 23rd - Jan 29th, 2017
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • DataSketches - A Java software library of stochastic streaming algorithms.
  • rtreestars864 - Immutable in-memory R-tree and R*-tree implementations in Java with reactive api.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jan 9th - Jan 15th, 2017
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • commons-math - Library of lightweight, self-contained mathematics and statistics components.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Dec 26th - Jan 1st, 2016
item.description:
Media

  • Give me 15 minutes and I'll change your view of Linux tracing - Brendan Gregg.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Dec 12th - Dec 18th, 2016
item.description:
Media

  • A Crash Course in Modern Hardware - Cliff Click

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Nov 21st - Nov 27th, 2016
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • CuckooFilter4Jstars131 - Bloom filter replacement for approximated set-membership queries.

    • People

  • Brendan Gregg - Cloud performance, kernel engineer, speaker, author.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Oct 3rd - Oct 9th, 2016
item.description:
Languages

  • Rembulanstars140 - Rembulan is an implementation of Lua 5.3 for the JVM, written in pure Java with minimal dependencies.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Aug 15th - Aug 21st, 2016
item.description:
Native

  • NuProcessstars519 - A low-overhead, non-blocking I/O, external Process execution implementation for Java.

    • Nix tools

  • sysdig - Capture system state and activity from a running Linux instance, then save, filter and analyze.

    • Profilers

  • jitwatch-intellijstars162 - JITWatch plugin for IntelliJ IDEA.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Aug 8th - Aug 14th, 2016
item.description:
Profilers

  • Tracerstars163 - Manages custom trace identifiers and carries them through distributed systems.

    • Media

  • Why JNI is slow? - Cliff Click
  • JVM Language Summit 2016 - JVM Language Summit 2016.

    • Communities

  • Performance Java User's Group - For expert Java developers who want to push their systems to the next level

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jul 4th - Jul 10th, 2016
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • Chronicle-Mapstars2.2k - In-memory key-value store designed for low-latency and/or multi-process applications.
  • lwjgl3stars3.2k - Java library that enables cross-platform access to popular native APIs useful in the development of graphics (OpenGL), audio (OpenAL) and parallel computing (OpenCL) applications.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jun 27th - Jul 3rd, 2016
item.description:
Network

  • armeriastars3.1k - Asynchronous RPC/API client/server library built on top of Java 8, Netty 4.1, HTTP/2, and Thrift.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jun 20th - Jun 26th, 2016
item.description:
Media

  • Extreme Profiling: Digging Into Hotspots - Nitsan Wakart.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jun 13th - Jun 19th, 2016
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • Zero-Allocation-Hashingstars571 - Hashing any sequences of bytes in Java, including all kinds of primitive arrays, buffers, CharSequences and more.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jun 6th - Jun 12th, 2016
item.description:
Profilers

  • jmh-compare-guistars69 - GUI for comparing JMH results.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm May 30th - Jun 5th, 2016
item.description:
Runtimes

  • Capsulestars1.1k - Dead-Simple Packaging and Deployment for JVM Apps.

    • Metaprogramming

  • immutables - Generate simple, safe and consistent value objects.
  • autostars9.2k - A collection of source code generators for Java.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • Agerastars7.3k - Reactive Programming for Android by Google.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm May 23rd - May 29th, 2016
item.description:
Metaprogramming

  • TeaVMstars1.7k - Ahead-of-time translating compiler (transpiler) from Java bytecode to JavaScript.

    • Languages

  • gojavastars182 - Java bindings for Go packages.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm May 16th - May 22nd, 2016
item.description:
Metaprogramming

  • Checker Framework - Compiler plug-ins that find bugs or verify their absence.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • rollinghashjavastars69 - Rolling hash functions in Java.
  • Chronicle-Queuestars2.3k - Micro second messaging that stores everything to disk.
  • cyclopsstars1.2k - Integration modules for RxJava, Reactor, FunctionalJava, Guava & Javaslang.
  • MapDB - Collections backed by off-heap or on-disk storage.
  • LevelDBstars1.3k - Rewrite (port) of LevelDB in Java.

    • Network

  • okhttpstars40k - An HTTP+HTTP/2 client for Android and Java applications.
  • gRPC - A high performance, open source, general RPC framework that puts mobile and HTTP/2 first.
  • Netty - Async event-driven network library for high performance protocol servers & clients.
  • Aeronstars5.5k - Efficient reliable UDP unicast, UDP multicast, and IPC message transport.

    • Garbage collectors

  • Balanced GC - GC policy available in the Java Virtual Machine for IBM WebSphere Application Server V8.

    • Media

  • JVM Mechanics - Douglas Hawkins.
  • With GC Solved, What Else Makes a JVM Pause? - John Cuthbertson.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm May 9th - May 15th, 2016
item.description:
Profilers

  • Java Flight Recorder (JFR) - Tool for collecting diagnostic and profiling data about a running Java application with almost no performance overhead.
  • HdrLogProcessingstars26 - Utilities for HDR Histogram logs manipulation.
  • jfr-flame-graphstars231 - Converting JFR Method Profiling Samples to FlameGraph compatible format.

    • Metaprogramming

  • GHCVMstars2.5k - A Haskell to JVM compiler that supports GHC Haskell.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm May 2nd - May 8th, 2016
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • Cap’n Proto - Insanely fast data interchange format and capability-based RPC system.
  • protobuf - Google's data interchange format.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Apr 25th - May 1st, 2016
item.description:
People

  • Peter Lawrey - Innovative developer of high performance Java systems for competitive advantage.
  • Richard Warburton - Developer, Speaker, Author.
  • Stuart Marks - Doctor Deprecator. Java/JDK/OpenJDK developer
  • Jonas Bonér - Founder & CTO of Lightbend.
  • Stéphane Maldini - Project Reactor Lead @Pivotal.
  • Dávid Karnok - RxJava committer that blogs about advanced RxJava.

    • Media

  • Java vs. C Performance - Cliff Click.

    • Metaprogramming

  • JSweet - A transpiler from Java to TypeScript/JavaScript.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Apr 11th - Apr 17th, 2016
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • ohcstars589 - Java large off heap cache developed for Apache Cassandra 3.0.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Mar 21st - Mar 27th, 2016
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • SmoothieMapstars257 - java.util.Map impl with worst put latencies more than 100 times smaller than java.util.HashMap.
  • Simple Binary Encodingstars2.4k - High Performance Message Codec.
  • FlatBuffers - Efficient cross platform serialization library for C++, C#, Go, Java, JavaScript, PHP, and Python.
  • stream-libstars2.2k - A Java library for summarizing data in streams for which it is infeasible to store all events.
  • bloofistars67 - Java implementation of multidimensional Bloom filters

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Mar 14th - Mar 20th, 2016
item.description:
Native

  • JavaCPPstars3.5k - JavaCPP provides efficient access to native C++ inside Java.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2016
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • Apache Arrow - A high-performance cross-system data layer for columnar in-memory analytics.

    • Metaprogramming

  • Sulongstars620 - LLVM IR interpreter written in Java using Truffle and Graal.
  • Trufflestars15.2k - Framework for implementing languages as simple interpreters.
  • derive4jstars511 - Algebraic data types constructors, pattern-matching, morphisms, optics and typeclasses.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Feb 8th - Feb 14th, 2016
item.description:
Media

  • Java Profiling from the Ground Up - Nitsan Wakart.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2016
item.description:
Languages

  • LuaJ - Java-centric implementation of lua vm built to leverage standard Java features.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • pcollectionsstars665 - A Persistent Java Collections Library.
  • RoaringBitmapstars2.2k - A better compressed bitset in Java.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Dec 21st - Dec 27th, 2015
item.description:
Virtual Machines

  • Avianstars1.2k - Lightweight highly portable JVM with an option for AOT compilation.
  • J2ObjCstars5.8k - Translator from Java source to Objective-C code. Keeps shared code between iOS native apps and Android native apps.
  • ParparVM - An Open Source Java bytecode to C translator for iOS native development. Designed as a part of the Codename One WORA for mobile project.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Dec 14th - Dec 20th, 2015
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • Reactor - Reactive data applications on the JVM for Java, Groovy, Clojure and other.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Nov 30th - Dec 6th, 2015
item.description:
Languages

  • Xtend - Flexible and expressive dialect of Java, which compiles into Java 5 source code.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • Reactive Streams - Standard for asynchronous stream processing with non-blocking back pressure.

    • Native

  • hawtjnistars136 - A JNI code generator based on the JNI generator used in Eclipse SWT.

    • People

  • Marcus Lagergren - Java language team alumnus.
  • Mark Reinhold - Chief Architect, Java Platform Group, Oracle.
  • Viktor Klang - Deputy CTO at Typesafe Inc.
  • Martijn Verburg - Java Champion.
  • Charles Nutter - JRuby guy.
  • Norman Maurer - Netty developer.
  • Ben Christensen - Facebook, Netflix, Apple engineering.
  • Todd L. Montgomery - Ex-CTO, Ex-NASA researcher, network geek, messaging middleware designer.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2015
item.description:
Languages

  • OCaml-Java - Supports OCaml language v4. Generates plain Java bytecode and have seamless integration with Java.
  • Golo - A simple dynamic language that makes extensive usage of invokedynamic.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • transducers-javastars113 - Composable algorithmic transformations independent from the context of their input and output sources.
  • gs-collectionsstars1.8k - Goldman Sachs collections framework.
  • clj-dsstars219 - Clojure's data structures modified for use outside of Clojure.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2015
item.description:
Documentation

  • Coordinated Omission problem - Discussion on Mechanical Sympathy.

    • Media

  • The Illusion of Execution - Nitsan Wakart.
  • Mythbusting Modern Hardware to Gain 'Mechanical Sympathy' - Martin Thompson.
  • Designing for Performance - Martin Thompson.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • JCTools - Concurrent data structures currently missing from the JDK.

    • Metaprogramming

  • Apache Calcite - Dynamic data management framework and SQL parser plugin.
  • Graal - New experimental just-in-time compiler for Java that is integrated with the HotSpot virtual machine.

    • Nix tools

  • likwidstars994 - Read hardware performance counters on Intel and AMD processors.

    • Profilers

  • jHiccup - jHiccup is an open source tool designed to measure the pauses and stalls associated with an application’s underlying Java runtime platform.

    • Virtual Machines

  • Zing - The only JVM that eliminates Java garbage collection pauses for large heap sizes.
  • Zulu - The only certified multi-platform build of OpenJDK: Free, 100% open source Java.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2015
item.description:
Memory and concurrency

  • RxJavastars44.6k - Library for composing asynchronous and event-based programs using observable sequences.

    • Load tools

  • wrk2stars3k - A constant throughput, correct latency recording variant of wrk.
  • Gatling - Asynchronous non-blocking scenario driven load testing tool for testing HTTP servers.

    • Profilers

  • hdrhistogram-metrics-reservoir - A Metrics Reservoir implementation backed by HdrHistogram.
  • metrics - Measure the behavior of critical components in production environment.

    • Media

  • How NOT to Measure Latency - Gil Tene.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2015
item.description:
Garbage collectors

  • Shenandoah - Ultra-Low-Pause-Time Garbage Collector.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • lightweight_triestars45 - A very memory-efficient trie (radix tree) implementation.

    • Metaprogramming

  • javaparserstars3.7k - Java 1.8 Parser and Abstract Syntax Tree for Java.
  • Antlr - Parser generator for reading, processing, executing, or translating structured text or binary files.
  • compile-testingstars571 - Testing tools for javac and annotation processors.
  • error-pronestars5.6k - Catch common Java mistakes as compile-time errors.
  • javacc - Parser generator for use with Java.
  • JavaPoetstars8.9k - A Java API for generating .java source files.
  • jparsecstars297 - Builds mini parsers in pure Java a la Haskell Parsec.
  • MPS - Design and build extensible DSLs and editors.
  • parboiledstars1.2k - Parsing of arbitrary input text based on parsing expression grammars.
  • Xtext - Framework for development of programming languages and DSLs.

    • Profilers

  • HdrHistogram - A Histogram that supports recording and analyzing sampled data value counts.
  • jmh - Micro benchmarks written in Java and other languages targetting the JVM.

    • Native

  • jnr-ffistars861 - Load native libraries without writing JNI code by hand.
  • jssemblystars117 - Execution of native assembly from Java.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Sep 14th - Sep 20th, 2015
item.description:
Profilers

  • MAT - Java heap analyzer that help find memory leaks and reduce memory consumption.
  • statsd-jvm-profilerstars330 - JVM agent profiler that sends profiling data to StatsD.
  • leakcanarystars26.1k - A memory leak detection library for Android and Java.
  • jammstars574 - Measure actual object memory use including JVM overhead.
  • aprofstars201 - Java memory allocation profiler.
  • heapsterstars387 - Production heap profiling for the JVM.
  • perf-map-agentstars1.4k - Generate method mappings to use with the linux perf tool.
  • java-sizeofstars124 - Memory consumption estimator for Java.
  • hawkshawstars40 - Tools for tracking down memory / JVM problems & generating predictable-as-possible VM behaviour.
  • polarbearstars20 - A tool to help diagnose OutOfMemoryError conditions.
  • allocation-instrumenterstars407 - Java agent that rewrites bytecode to instrument allocation sites.
  • perfjstars355 - Linux perf for java programs.
  • jitwatchstars2.4k - Log analyser / visualiser for Java HotSpot JIT compiler.

    • Network

  • tcpdump - Packet analyzer for network traffic capture.
  • tcpflowstars1.2k - Captures TCP connections flows in a way that is convenient for protocol analysis and debugging.
  • tcpreplaystars766 - Pcap editing and replay tools.
  • muxystars761 - Simulating real-world distributed system failures.
  • comcaststars6.9k - Simulating shitty network connections.
  • pigstars389 - A Linux packet crafting tool.
  • gorstars14.1k - HTTP traffic replay in real-time.
  • jRTstars44 - Measures response time of a java application to socket-based requests.
  • K3POstars41 - Create arbitrary network traffic and behavior to certify whether a network endpoint behaves correctly.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • hppcstars765 - High Performance Primitive Collections.
  • low-gc-membuffersstars130 - In-memory circular buffers that use direct ByteBuffers to minimize GC overhead.
  • Kolobokestars918 - Java Collections til the last breadcrumb of memory and performance.
  • Agronastars1.9k - Library of data structures and utility methods that are a common need when building high-performance applications.
  • caffeinestars9.8k - A high performance caching library for Java 8.
  • high-scale-libstars377 - Cliff Click's High Scale Library.
  • PauselessHashMapstars145 - A java.util.HashMap compatible map that won't stall puts or gets when resizing.
  • Quasar - Lightweight threads and actors for the JVM.
  • stormpotstars269 - A fast object pool for the JVM.
  • okiostars7.5k - Modern Java IO library that do clever things to save CPU and memory.

    • Bytecode

  • Jitescriptstars176 - Bytecode generation library similar to BiteScript.

    • Native

  • Project Panama - Enriching the connections between the JVM and APIs used by C programmers.
  • j2v8stars2k - Java API for Google's V8 JavaScript engine.

    • Nix tools

  • Flame Graphs - Visualization of profiled software, allowing the most frequent code-paths to be identified quickly and accurately.

    • Documentation

  • False sharing - Threads impact the performance of each other while modifying independent variables sharing the same cache line. Martin Thompson.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Aug 31st - Sep 6th, 2015
item.description:
Virtual Machines

  • jvm.gostars3.3k - A JVM written in Go.

    • Network

  • SimianArmystars7.8k - Resiliency tool that helps ensure that your applications can tolerate random instance failures.

    • Bytecode

  • Byte Buddy - Code generation library creating Java classes at runtime without the help of a compiler.

    • Profilers

  • honest-profilerstars1.2k - Sampling JVM profiler without the safepoint sample bias.

    • Runtimes

  • jvmkillstars138 - Agent that forcibly terminates the JVM when it is unable to allocate memory or create a thread.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Aug 24th - Aug 30th, 2015
item.description:
Nix tools

  • oprofile - System-wide hardware performance monitoring with easy-to-use interface at low overhead.
  • hwloc - Reports the structure of the processor, number of cores, hyperthreads and cache size.
  • numactl - Control NUMA policy for processes or shared memory.
  • jstat - Monitors GC and compiler statistics in the JVM.
  • perf-toolsstars7.5k - Performance analysis tools based on Linux perf_events (aka perf) and ftrace.

    • Memory and concurrency

  • Chronicle-Bytesstars257 - Low level memory access wrappers.
  • netty-buffers - Memory buffer pool implementation similar to jemalloc.
  • fasttuplestars135 - Collections that are laid out adjacently in both on- and off-heap memory.
  • ObjectLayout - A layout-optimized Java data structure package.

    • Network

  • pcap4jstars867 - Java library for capturing, crafting, and sending packets using libpcap.

    • Bytecode

  • asmtools - Used to develop tools for the production of Java .class files.

    • Profilers

  • JOL - Analyze actual object layout schemes, footprint, and references in JVMs.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Aug 17th - Aug 23rd, 2015
item.description:
Profilers

  • jvmtopstars1.1k - Lightweight console application to monitor running jvms on a machine in top-like manner.
  • YourKit - Fully featured, easy to use, low overhead profiler.
  • Overseer - Low-Level Hardware Monitoring and Management for Java.

    • Virtual Machines

  • DCEVM - Modification of Java HotSwap VM with unlimited support for reloading classes at runtime.

    • Runtimes

  • HotswapAgentstars1.6k - Redefine classes at runtime and skip the redeploy process.
  • Nailgun - Nailgun is a client, protocol, and server for running Java programs from the command line without incurring the JVM startup overhead.

item.title: deephacks/awesome-jvm Aug 10th - Aug 16th, 2015
item.description:
Nix tools

  • javap - Disassembles class files into code that reflects the java bytecode.
  • jhat - Java Heap Analysis Tool
  • jinfo - Prints configuration information for a given process.
  • jstack - Prints stack traces of threads for a given Java process.
  • sysstat - Performance monitoring tools for Linux.
  • atoptool - Logging of system and process activity for long-term analysis, highlighting overloaded system.
  • perf - Linux profiling with performance counters.

    • Profilers

  • JVMTI - Provide a native API to inspect the state and to control the execution of applications running in the JVM.
  • Zipkinstars14.3k - A distributed tracing system gather timing data for disparate services developed by Twitter.
  • Chronon - Record your entire java program. Replay on any machine.
  • Takipi - Tells you when and why code breaks in production.
  • BTracestars4.5k - a safe, dynamic tracing tool for the Java platform.
  • Swiss Java Knifestars2.9k - Small set of tools for JVM troublshooting, monitoring and profiling.
  • GCViewerstars3.7k - GCViewer is a tool that visualizes verbose GC output.
  • Riemann JVM Profilerstars288 - JVM agent which sends function-level profiler telemetry to a Riemann server for analysis, visualization, and storage.
  • JProfiler - Helps resolve performance bottlenecks, pin down memory leaks and understand threading issues.

    • People

  • Gil Tene - Azul Systems.
  • Dave Dice - Senior research scientist in the Scalable Synchronization Research Group within Oracle.
  • Brian Goetz - Java Language Architect at Oracle.
  • John Rose - HotSpot developer.
  • Aleksey Shipilëv - Developing Oracle/Open JDK/Hotspot and other Java-related technologies.
  • Martin Thompson - Pasty faced performance gangster.
  • Nitsan Wakart - Azul Systems.
  • Doug Lea - Author of the Java memory model.
  • Cliff Click - Creator of the HotSpot Server Compiler.

    • Garbage collectors

  • G1 - The Garbage-First Garbage Collector.

    • Communities

  • hotspot-compiler-dev - Technical discussion about the development of the HotSpot bytecode compilers.
  • hotspot-gc-dev - Technical discussion about the development of the HotSpot garbage collectors.
  • hotspot-dev - HotSpot development mailing list.
  • mechanical-sympathy - Discussing how to code sympathetically to and measure the underlying stack/platform so good performance can be extracted.
  • concurrency-interest - Discussion list for JSR-166.

    • Documentation

  • The JVM specification - The Java Virtual

    • Media

  • Bits of advice for VM writers - Cliff Click.
  • Understanding Java garbage collection ... - Gil Tene.
  • Faster Object Arrays - Gil Tene at GOTO Conferences.
  • Java Memory Model Pragmatics - Aleksey Shipilev.
  • JVM Language Summit 2015 - JVM Language Summit 2015.

    • Virtual Machines

  • Dalvik - Android runtime (ART) is the managed runtime used by applications and some system services on Android.
  • HotSpot - HotSpot virtual machine maintained and distributed by Oracle Corporation.
  • IBM J9 - JVM developed by IBM.

    • Runtimes

  • CRaSH - The shell for the Java Platform.
  • Dripstars1.5k - Fast JVM launching without the hassle of persistent JVMs.

    • Languages

  • Renjin - JVM-based interpreter for the R language for the statistical analysis
  • Erjang - A JVM-based Erlang VM.
  • JRuby - Implementation of the Ruby language on the JVM.
  • Jython - Python for the Java Platform.
  • Kawa - Extension of the Scheme language, which is in the Lisp family of programming languages.
  • Nashorn - Lightweight high-performance JavaScript runtime in Java with a native JVM.
  • Fregestars3.4k - Pure functional programming language in the spirit of Haskell.
  • Ceylon - Object-oriented, strong and static programming language with an emphasis on immutability, created by Red Hat.
  • Scala - Strong and static programming language that combine object-oriented and functional programming ideas.
  • Clojure - Dialect of Lisp created by Rich Hickey. Dynamically typed with emphasis on functional programming.
  • Groovy - Optionally typed and dynamic language, with static-typing and static compilation capabilities.
  • Java - General-purpose, concurrent, strongly typed, class-based object-oriented language.
  • Kotlin - Statically typed programming language for the JVM, Android and the browser.
